summary: TestHistoryTable migration from Dashboard to Board page verified. All tests passed. Board page correctly displays TestHistoryTable with stats-bar, global-search, and history-data-table. Dashboard page correctly has only Posts, Quiz Rooms, and Reposts tabs - History tab removed.
critical_code_review_comments: Board.js: TestHistoryTable correctly imported and integrated with state management (lines 13, 179-180, 253-265, 1099-1104)
Dashboard.js: History tab and TestHistoryTable completely removed - only Posts, Quiz Rooms, Reposts tabs remain (lines 552-594)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Board has TestHistoryTable, Dashboard has no History tab)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo1 user with 40 test history records
context_for_next_testing_agent: TestHistoryTable migration complete. Board page (/board) now shows test history with TanStack DataTable including stats-bar, global-search, exam/subject/status pill filters, and pagination. Dashboard page (/dashboard) only has Posts, Quiz Rooms, and Reposts tabs. Login with demo1/demo1, redirects to /victory-lane, then navigate to /board or /dashboard.
